hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'vault/candidatos/SCOUT-'; then echo '📝 Vault note saved: '"$(basename $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH)"; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'corpus/corpus-data.json'; then echo '⚠️  corpus-data.json modified — run sync hf to update HF dataset and python tools/scripts/sync_companion.py to update companion'; fi
